events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "findings": [
    "Wire pulling in progress without evidence of prerequisite hold point signoff",
    "Conductors not identified per NEC 200.6 and 210.5"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Verify and document completion of prerequisite hold point",
    "Apply proper conductor identification per NEC 200.6 and 210.5 before proceeding"
  ],
  "rationale": "Work observed after a hold point without signoff indicates a sequence violation. Lack of conductor identification violates NEC 200.6 and 210.5, creating a safety hazard and non-compliance.",
  "references": ["NEC 200.6", "NEC 210.5"]
}
